meta.name: Turn YouTube meeting recordings into Notion notes with Claude, deAPI, and Slack alerts

parameters.content:
## Try It Out!
### Automatically turn YouTube recordings into structured notes, action items, and Slack summaries.

This workflow monitors a YouTube channel via RSS for new uploads, transcribes the video, uses AI to extract key topics, action items, and decisions, creates a Notion page, and posts a summary to Slack.

### How it works
1. **RSS Feed Trigger** polls a YouTube channel for new video uploads
2. **deAPI Transcribe Video** extracts the transcript using Whisper from the YouTube URL
3. **Extract From File** converts the transcript binary into text
4. **AI Agent** analyzes the transcript and produces structured meeting notes
5. **Notion** creates a meeting notes page in your database
6. **Slack** posts the summary and action items to a channel

### Requirements
- [deAPI](https://deapi.ai) account for video transcription
- Anthropic account for AI Agent
- Notion workspace with a meeting notes database
- Slack workspace
- n8n instance must be on **HTTPS**

### Need Help?
Join the [n8n Discord](https://discord.gg/n8n) or ask in the [Forum](https://community.n8n.io/)!

Happy Automating!

### How to get your YouTube Channel RSS URL

```
https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?channel_id=YOUR_CHANNEL_ID
```

To find your **Channel ID**:
1. Go to the YouTube channel page
2. Click **More** → **Share channel** → **Copy channel ID**

Or find it in the channel URL:
`youtube.com/channel/UCxxxxxx`

No YouTube API key needed — RSS feeds are public.

## 1. RSS Feed Trigger
[Read more about RSS Trigger](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/core-nodes/n8n-nodes-base.rssfeedread)

Polls a YouTube channel's RSS feed for new video uploads.

Set the **Feed URL** to your channel's RSS URL.

No file size limits — deAPI transcribes directly from the YouTube URL.

## 2. Transcribe Video
[deAPI Documentation](https://docs.deapi.ai)

Uses **Whisper Large V3** to transcribe the video directly from the YouTube URL.

Returns the transcript as binary data via `result_url`.

## 3. Extract Transcript Text
[Read more about Extract From File](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/core-nodes/n8n-nodes-base.extractfromfile)

Converts the binary transcript from deAPI into a text string.

The extracted text is passed to the AI Agent for analysis.

## 4. AI-Powered Note Extraction
[Read more about AI Agents](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/cluster-nodes/root-nodes/n8n-nodes-langchain.agent)

The AI Agent analyzes the transcript and extracts:
- **Summary** — what was discussed
- **Action items** — who does what
- **Decisions** — what was agreed on
- **Key topics** — main themes

The **Structured Output Parser** ensures consistent JSON output.

## 5. Save to Notion
[Read more about Notion node](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/app-nodes/n8n-nodes-base.notion)

Creates a new page in your Notion meeting notes database.

Configure the **Database ID** and map the output fields to your database properties.

## 6. Notify via Slack
[Read more about Slack node](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/app-nodes/n8n-nodes-base.slack)

Posts a summary with action items to your team's Slack channel.

Swap for Microsoft Teams, email, or any other notification node.

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert meeting note-taker. You will receive a meeting transcript.

Your tasks:
1. Write a concise title for the meeting based on the discussion topics.
2. Write a brief summary (3-5 sentences) of what was discussed.
3. Extract all action items with the responsible person if mentioned (format: "- @person: task").
4. List key decisions that were made.
5. List the main topics that were covered.

Return the structured notes in the required JSON format.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "title": "Weekly Product Sync — March 5",
  "summary": "The team reviewed Q2 roadmap priorities and agreed to focus on the auth redesign first. Timeline for the migration was pushed to next sprint.",
  "action_items": "- @alice: Finalize design specs by Friday\n- @bob: Set up staging environment\n- @carol: Schedule follow-up with security team",
  "decisions": "- Moving forward with Option B for the auth system\n- Postponing the database migration to next sprint",
  "key_topics": "- Q2 roadmap priorities\n- Auth system redesign\n- Database migration timeline\n- Team capacity planning"
}
